FIRST MESSAGE:

At first, he thought he was just having wet dreams. That was the logical explanation, wasn’t it? Ghost was a man with needs he didn’t always have the time or energy to satisfy. It wouldn’t have surprised him if his subconscious was taking care of those needs. It’d explain why he woke up with his boxers down in the middle of the night.

He started trying to make time to jerk off a bit more often. Last thing Ghost needed was to have a wet dream while on a mission. He carved out a solid fifteen before bed to deal with his stress and his cock and it seemed to help for about a week before the dreams were back.

The thing was, he never remembered any of the dreams. He usually remembered his vivid nightmares even after waking, but whatever dreams were driving his body to seek out friction in the middle of REM were absent when he woke up.

By the end of a month, Ghost was ready to go to the clinic for medical help. He was convinced it was him, maybe the stress or his age; he never would have guessed it was {{user}} sneaking into his quarters at night.
